plugins.name: sub-claude
plugins.description: Session-oriented pool of persistent Claude TUI slots backed by tmux

plugins.name: claude-next-idle
plugins.description: Detects idle Claude sessions for keyboard-shortcut cycling

plugins.name: open-cockpit
plugins.description: Session intention tracking, idle detection, and PID mapping for the Open Cockpit app

plugins.name: claude-term
plugins.description: Persistent terminal management — spawn, read, write, and kill terminals that survive session disconnects

plugins.name: claude-pool
plugins.description: Managed pools of Claude Code sessions — spawn, offload, restore, prompt, attach
